content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学预计于3月9日08:00~11:00（UTC+8）进行校内设施维护。
       维护结束后需要重新登入并更新资源，补给物资将会通过信件向守密人发放。若有任何疑问，欢迎通过校区内客服中心咨询，感谢您的理解与支持！
    
【补给物资】
停服维护补偿：银芯×200、无垢之芯×5
     
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年3月23日09:00。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。
 
【更新内容】
一、活动
【角色活动：莫丝】
● 在 3 月 9 日 9:00 至 4 月 6 日 9:00 期间，以下活动限时开放！
    ○ 角色活动唤醒「溺祸漩涡」：深海界域伤害型唤醒体「莫丝」。
    ○ 命轮活动唤醒「遗落孤岛」：命轮「渺远的伊甸园」。
    ○ 试玩活动「漩涡」：试用「莫丝」，可获取「银芯」×40、「流明之芯」×1。
● 在 3 月 9 日 9:00 至 3 月 23 日 9:00 期间，玩法活动「默斯克斯的呼唤」限时开放！
    ○ 攻略活动可获得限定 SR 命轮「被囚禁的疯狂」与限定头像「以银钥之名：莫丝」。
        ■ 共计可获取「银芯」×700、「流明之芯」×6、「无垢之芯」×6、「贤石碎屑」×285、「群星余梦」×35、「碎裂余梦」×60、「拟态凝晶」×300，并且可以无限量兑换「千面印章」、「蔷薇金券」。
    ○ 拥有唤醒体「莫丝」、命轮「渺远的伊甸园」与「被囚禁的疯狂」可大幅提高活动攻略效率！
    ○ 活动期间意识潜游「沉溺」无需「现实起点」即可解锁！
 
【角色活动复刻：旺达】
● 在 3 月 23 日 9:00 至 4 月 20 日 9:00 期间，以下活动限时开放！
    ○ 角色活动唤醒「三相衡生」可在以下角色活动唤醒中任意切换：
        ■ 「脊刺之主」：超维界域防御型唤醒体「旺达」。
        ■ 「代行神愿」：血肉界域防御型唤醒体「萨尔瓦多」。
        ■ 「永燃之火」：混沌界域伤害型唤醒体「凯蒂古拉」。
        ■ 以上唤醒体的试玩活动「聚灵演练」同步开放：可获取「银芯」×120、「流明之芯」×3。
    ○ 命轮活动唤醒「因果苗圃」可在以下命轮活动唤醒中任意切换：
        ■ 「纵声飨宴」：命轮「女王的戒律」。
        ■ 「万物之初」：命轮「神言石板」。
        ■ 「死亡如约」：命轮「琥珀色的死亡」。
● 在 3 月 23 日 9:00 至 4 月 6 日 9:00 期间，玩法活动「燃烧的群宴」限时开放！
    ○ 攻略活动可获得限定 SR 命轮「伊萨拉乌的目光」与限定头像「以银钥之名：旺达」。
        ■ 共计可获取「银芯」×700、「流明之芯」×5、「无垢之芯」×5、「贤石碎屑」×285、「群星余梦」×35、「碎裂余梦」×60、「拟态凝晶」×300，并且可以无限量兑换「蔷薇金券」。
    ○ 拥有唤醒体「旺达」、命轮「女王的戒律」与「伊萨拉乌的目光」可大幅提高活动攻略效率！
    ○ 活动期间意识潜游「燃烧的群宴」无需「现实起点」即可解锁！
 
【联动活动复刻：逆转回合】
● 活动「相位逆转」将于 3 月 16 日 9:00 至 3 月 30 日 9:00 开放复刻！
    ○ 多维连接仪器探测到未知波动——神秘来客已入侵相位对弈空间。守密人，和唤醒体一起，将对弈空间再次逆转吧。
    ○ 游玩「相位对弈」，完成活动任务累积「魔法橡果」，即可获得丰厚奖励。
        ■ 「银芯」×2000、「无垢之芯」×10、「蔷薇金券」×5000000、「贤石碎屑」×240、「钢笔」×300、「碎裂余梦」×60、「群星余梦」×35。
        ■ 限定头像「逆转回合：万象牌」、限定对战表情：「干杯」、「打得不错」、「亚维斯·不服气」、「波妮·疑惑」、「伊格娜蒂丝·到我咯」、「贝蒂·哭泣」、「莱特·震惊」、「凯希·盯」、「杜兰·豁然开朗」、「莉雅·诶我也要上吗」。
    ○ 活动期间多维链接「逆转回合」无需「现实起点」即可解锁！
 
【特别唤醒：晦夜引灯】
● 守密人在完成序章后 30 天内，特别唤醒活动「晦夜引灯」开放！
    ○ 助新入学的守密人快速组建心仪的队伍！
    ○ 更新前已完成序章的守密人，则在本次更新后首次登录起 30 天内开放。
● 可在以下「忘却篇」的所有 SSR 限定唤醒体中，选择 4 名作为指定目标，选定后不可变更。
    ○ 混沌：莉莉、「24」、莱克、哈姆林、塔薇。
    ○ 深海：图鲁、墨菲、弥利亚姆。
    ○ 血肉：索蕾尔、萨尔瓦多、泰旖丝、血链·希洛。
    ○ 超维：达芙黛尔、旺达、奥尔拉。
● 通过本次唤醒活动获得 SSR 唤醒体时，有 50% 的概率为选定的唤醒体。
    ○ 若上一次获得的 SSR 奖励为常驻唤醒体，则下次获得的 SSR 奖励必定为选定的唤醒体。
    ○ 每个选定的 SSR 唤醒体获得概率相等。
 
【命轮纪行：幸运赢家】
● 在 3 月 9 日 9:00 至 4 月 6 日 9:00 期间，特别活动「幸运赢家」限时开放！
    ○ 活动期间，完成任务可累计获得：「无垢之芯」×25、限定 SSR 纪念命轮「豪赌的智慧」×4。
    ○ 活动期间，解锁高级纪行后可额外累计获得：「流明之芯」×25、限定 SSR 纪念命轮「豪赌的智慧」×12。
    ○ 解锁高级纪行需要「源液」×980。
 
【预购纪行：共轭命途】
● 在 3 月 23 日 9:00 至 5 月 4 日 9:00 期间，预购纪行「共轭命途」限时开放！
    ○ 购买纪行需要「源液」×1980。购买后，随每日登录逐步解锁，累计可额外获得：「银芯」×20000、「流明之芯」×30、「原型视界」×1、「循环母版」×1、「群星余梦」×25、「碎裂余梦」×100。
    ○ 早购福利截止 4 月 6 日 9:00，在此前购买可额外获得：专属奖励纪念头像「命运织者」、「无形者的请柬」×10！
 
【学园活动：第 30 期】
● 在 3 月 9 日 9:00 至 4 月 6 日 9:00 期间，以下学园活动限时开放！
    ○ 「学园礼赠」：活动期间累计登录 7 天即可获得「流明之芯」×10 的丰厚奖励！累计登录可获得其他奖励！
    ○ 「课题纪录」学期限定头像：「典藏邮票：塔薇」、「典藏邮票：莉莉」、「典藏邮票：萝坦」、「典藏邮票：奥吉尔」、「弥萨格幕间剧：拉蒙娜」、「弥萨格幕间剧：环行·拉蒙娜」。
    ○ 「默斯克斯的呼唤」赛季限定对战表情：「拉蒙娜·忠诚」、「诺缔拉·望远镜」、「图鲁·凌驾」、「奥瑞塔·出发」。


二、故事
【意识潜游：沉溺】
● 「意识潜游」新增篇章「沉溺」！
    ○ 贪婪的赐予更多，容易满足的，将其本拥有的全部拿走。
    ○ 当我们凝望海洋，凝望的并非只是祂的浩瀚与美，海洋吞没记忆，海洋吞没恐惧，洋流的所有汇聚都转瞬即逝。
    ○ 海洋在呼唤你，没入永恒孤独的沉寂。
● 通关后，即可获得全新钥令「溺亡的纯真」！
    ○ 钥令效果：选择一名唤醒体获得 15 点狂气，其他唤醒体获得 5 点狂气。莫丝：立刻释放「涡！流！弹！」进行追击。
 
【典藏馆】
● 「留声机」新增专辑「不梦乡志异」。

三、战斗
● 唤醒体新增「基础狂气」属性。「超限爆发」的狂气消耗描述、以及各类提高狂气上限效果的描述，统一采用「基础狂气」。
● 唤醒体「奥瑞塔」、「弥利亚姆」的战斗音效更加清晰，打击感更强。
● 造物「时灵摆·潜游」的额外效果仅对「指令卡」触发，不再对所有类型的卡牌生效。
● 敌人「绘者」所召唤的敌人「融蚀-诗中人」攻击强度提升约 100%，召唤的敌人「融蚀-追随者」、「融蚀-渴求者」不再拥有护盾。
● 以下战斗将不再支持「自动战斗」：
    ○ 「幕间演习-唤醒体试玩」中的所有战斗。
    ○ 在 3 月 16 日 9:00 起的「融灾禁区」中所有战斗。
    ○ 「调查行动」普通模式和困难模式每一章的最终首领战。
    ○ 「调查行动」以下关卡的普通模式与困难模式：2-15、9-3、9-5 至 9-11。
● 「编队」中的分享码更加简短，以前的较长分享码将仍然有效。
● 「编队」界面在重复打开时会更快出现。
● 包含「剧情预设」唤醒体的特殊编队关卡，默认使用本篇章中已通关的上一个包含相同「剧情预设」唤醒体的编队信息，减少重复操作。

四、综合
● 首次使用 PC 和移动设备登录后，可在「设置-账户」中领取专属奖励。
    ○ 使用 PC 设备登录，可领取：限定头像「温柯尔·大型终端」×1、「流明之芯」×1。
    ○ 使用移动设备登录，可领取：限定头像「艾瑞卡·便携终端」×1、「流明之芯」×1。
● 活动「聚灵演练」中，如果此前已经通关过相应唤醒体的试玩关卡，无需重复游玩即可立刻领取奖励。
● 活动「疾驰的欢愉专列」中，新增了「贵宾名录」重置的倒计时展示。
● 活动「返校日」中「返校商店」按钮的位置有所调整，不容易误点击到活动选择页签。
● 登录「用户中心」的过程中再次点击「进入游戏」时，将提示：「用户中心」登录中，请稍后。
● 「唤醒体」的「详情」界面中，唤醒体达到 60 级以后会显示下个等级阶段的预览按钮，若唤醒体已满级则不再显示该按钮。
● 「唤醒体」的「技能」、「天赋」界面中，当选择的技能、天赋已达到满级时，不再显示「满级预览」按钮。
● 「回溯」返还结果的预览界面，物品展示区域新增了边框展示。
● 「唤醒」的「规则说明」中括号内关于保底综合出率说明的文字颜色，与其他括号说明文本统一。
● 「唤醒」界面右下角说明文本的自适应规则有所调整，在部分语言设置下不再与界面中间区域的命轮名称等文本发生重叠。
● 「异梦视界」右侧有显示不完整的篇章时，边框内不再显示篇章图片，与「特遣纪录」、「意识潜游」界面保持统一。
● 「试玩」关卡进入战斗后的唤醒体介绍弹窗更加美观，文本展示区域更充裕。
● 「设置-声音」中「游戏界面非当前窗口」选项名称调整为「后台播放」，位置调整至「音量」选项下，「主音量」分类名称调整为「整体控制」。
● 所有界面中，关于物品名称和数量的描述格式统一为：「物品名称」×数量。

五、相位对弈
【新增内容】
● 唤醒体「莫丝」
    ○ 斗争职阶，生命 107。
    ○ 狂气爆发「深渊！漩涡！炮！」：消耗 100 点狂气。对前排敌方造成 30 伤害，升级为「深渊！漩涡！二式！」。若未造成击杀，获得 1 层「涡流」。
    ○ 狂气爆发「深渊！漩涡！二式！」：消耗 100 点狂气。造成 30 伤害，贯穿，升级为「深渊！漩涡！大轰炸！」。若未造成击杀，获得 1 层「涡流」。
    ○ 狂气爆发「深渊！漩涡！大轰炸！」：消耗 100 点狂气。对全体敌方造成 30 伤害。若未造成击杀，获得 1 层「涡流」。
    ○ 技能「漩流护身」：算力消耗 1。延迟：60 狂气。直到下回合开始，失去生命后将等量延迟狂气转化为护盾。
    ○ 技能「潆洄波动」：算力消耗 2。获得 1 层「涡流」并将 2 张「波动弹」置入手牌。
    ○ 技能「波动弹」：算力消耗 5。造成 30 伤害，获得 30 狂气，预备 1。
    ○ 状态「涡流」：击杀敌方时移除所有该状态，每移除 1 层获得 30 狂气。上限 2 层。
● 命轮与钥令
    ○ 命轮「渺远的伊甸园」：算力消耗 2。「狂气爆发」后使自身获得 20 护盾和延迟：20 狂气。
    ○ 命轮「被囚禁的疯狂」：算力消耗 2。每回合首次打出「技能」后对生命与护盾最低的敌方造成 10 伤害。
    ○ 钥令「溺亡的纯真」：生成 1 张手牌中算力最高的「技能」复制，并使所属唤醒体获得 10 狂气。
 
【对弈平衡】
● 唤醒体
    ○ 泰旖丝
        ■ 狂气爆发「丰穰之仪」：回复生命从 35 提高为 40。
        ■ 技能「连绵的本能」：伤害从 10 提高为 12。
    ○ 旺达
        ■ 技能「迷途梦引」：临时反击从 6 提高为 8。
        ■ 技能「活尸之墙」：临时反击从 3 提高为 4。
    ○ 尤乌哈希
        ■ 狂气爆发「血与沙的赞歌」：造成出血从 35 提高为 40。
    ○ 徐
        ■ 狂气爆发「夜雾下的情誓」：每移除 1 层「痴醉」造成的伤害从 12 提升为 15，并额外获得 1 强效。
        ■ 技能「藕丝难杀」：伤害从 12 提高为 16。
        ■ 技能「缱绻夜雾」：获得狂气从 15 提高为 20。
        ■ 技能「暗通款曲」：伤害从 8 提高为 12。
    ○ 拉蒙娜
        ■ 狂气爆发「世界演绎法」：不再获得强化。
        ■ 技能「弥萨格利刃」：伤害从 10 提高为 12。
    ○ 潘狄娅
        ■ 技能「无上的喜悦」：算力消耗从 1 降低为 0，伤害从 12 降低为 10，获得狂气从 30 降低为 20。
    ○ 艾继丝
        ■ 技能「虚弱凝视」：伤害从 12 降低为 10。
    ○ 莉莉
        ■ 狂气爆发「淤泥上的不灭之花」：伤害从 35 降低为 30。
    ○ 奥瑞塔
        ■ 狂气爆发「喧嚣的海洋」：伤害从 12 降低为 10。
    ○ 塔薇
        ■ 狂气爆发「万物归一」：伤害从 5 提高为 10。
    ○ 法洛思
        ■ 技能「湮赛宝藏」：不再拥有预备。
    ○ 凯蒂古拉
        ■ 狂气爆发「焚却世界的爆炎」：伤害从 60 降低为 52。
        ■ 技能「告死魔弹」：消耗算力造成的额外伤害从 10 降低为 8。
    ○ 莱克
        ■ 技能「杠杆投机」：伤害从 8 提高为 10。
        ■ 技能「牌桌把戏」：伤害从 5 提高为 6。
    ○ 萨尔瓦多
        ■ 技能「神圣骨血」：伤害从 5 提高为 7。
        ■ 技能「审判」：伤害从 10 提高为 12。
● 命轮
    ○ 「枉蹙眉」：效果调整为使自身的所有「技能」算力消耗 -1。
    ○ 「玉兰之饵」：算力消耗从 2 降低为 1，施加「痴醉」层数由 1 提高为 2。
    ○ 「永不停歇的演奏」：算力消耗从 2 降低为 1。
    ○ 「倒数时刻」：算力消耗从 3 降低为 1。
    ○ 「沉入殷红」：算力消耗从 2 提高为 3。
    ○ 「于暴雨之中」：算力消耗从 1 提高为 2。
    ○ 「贪婪」：算力消耗从 1 提高为 2。
    ○ 「信息就是生命」：算力消耗从 3 提高为 4。
    ○ 「坠入虚无的人偶」：算力消耗从 3 提高为 4。
● 钥令
    ○ 「深宅往事」：额外使选择的友方获得 1 强效。
    ○ 「群星的庇佑」：弃掉对方算力最高的牌由 2 张调整为 3 张。
    ○ 「重逢心愿」：变化的「技能」算力消耗不再变化。
    ○ 「仲夏之梦」：效果变更为抽 5 张非「打击」牌。
    ○ 「海之祭」：不再使目标失去狂气。
    ○ 「定格的仲夏留念」：抽算力最低的「技能」张数由 3 降低为 2。
    ○ 「虚世之彩」：造成伤害从 8 降低为 6。
    ○ 「酒馆之门」：「莉雅的硬币」由「置入抽牌堆」调整为「置入弃牌堆」。
 
【其他】
● 「唤醒体试训」支持在「轮选模式」中尝试更多与造物的搭配可能性。
● 唤醒体「克莱门汀」的「心理绞杀」等迫使对手弃掉手牌的表现效果更清晰直观。

● When clicking "Enter Game" again while logging into "User Center", a hint will appear: "User Center" logging in, please wait.
● In the "Awakener" "Details" interface, once an Awakener reaches Level 60, a preview button for the next level stage will be displayed. If the Awakener has reached the maximum level, this button will no longer be shown.
● In the "Skill" and "Talent" interfaces of the "Awakener," when the selected skill or talent has reached the maximum level, the "Max Level Preview" button will no longer be displayed.

● The preview screen for "Reset" return results now features a newly added border display in the item showcase area.
● The text color of the bracket description regarding the guaranteed overall rate in the "Rules" section of "Awaken" should be unified with other bracket description texts.
● The adaptive rules for the description text in the bottom-right corner of the "Awaken" interface have been adjusted, preventing overlap with texts such as the Wheel of Destiny name in the middle area of the interface under certain language settings.
● When there are chapters with incomplete display on the right side of "Dreamscape", chapter images will no longer be shown within the border, maintaining consistency with the "Special Ops" and "Psyche Deepdive" interfaces.
● The Awakener Overview pop-up that appears after entering battle in "Trial" Stages has been made more visually appealing, with a more spacious text display area.
● The "Game Interface Not Current Window" option in "Settings - Sound" has been renamed to "Background Playback," relocated below the "Volume" option, and the "Master Volume" category has been renamed to "Overall Control."
● In all interfaces, the description format for item names and quantities is unified as: "Item Name" × Quantity.

5. Traphase
[New Content]
● Awakener "Vortice"
    ○ Warborn Rank, HP 107.
    ○ Exalt "Abyssal! Vortex! Cannon!": Consumes 100 Aliemus. Deal 30 DMG to the front-row enemy, and upgrade to "Abyssal! Vortex! Mk. II!". If no kills are made, gain 1 stack of "Vortex."
    ○ Exalt "Abyssal! The Spire! Mk. II!": Consumes 100 Aliemus. Deal 30 DMG, Pierce, and upgrade to "Abyssal! The Spire! Mega-Blast!". If no kills are made, gain 1 stack of "Vortex."
    ○ Exalt "Abyss! The Spire! Grand Bombardment!": Consume 100 Aliemus. Deal 30 DMG to all enemies. If no Kill is made, gain 1 stack of "Vortex."
    ○ Skill "Vortex Shield": Arithmetica Cost 1. Delay: 60 Aliemus. Until the start of the next turn, after losing HP, convert an equal amount of Delayed Aliemus into Shield.
    ○ Skill "Eddying Ripples": Arithmetica Cost 2. Obtain 1 stack of "Vortex" and add 2 "Tidal Shell" to your Hand.
    ○ Skill "Tidal Shell": Arithmetica Cost 5. Deal 30 DMG, gain 30 Aliemus, Prepare 1.
    ○ State "Vortex": When killing an enemy, remove all stacks of this State. For each stack removed, gain 30 Aliemus. Maximum 2 stacks.
● Wheel of Destiny and Posse
    ○ Wheel of Destiny "The Faraway Eden": Arithmetica Cost 2. After "Exalt", grant self 20 Shield and Delay: 20 Aliemus.
    ○ Wheel of Destiny "Imprisoned Madness": Arithmetica Cost 2. After playing a "Skill" for the first time each turn, deal 10 DMG to the enemy with the lowest HP and Shield.
    ○ Posse "Drowned Innocence": Generate a Copy of the "Skill" with the highest Arithmetica in your Hand, and the corresponding Awakener gains 10 Aliemus.

[Game Balance]

[Other]
● "Awakener Trial" supports trying out more possible combinations with Relics in "Draft Pick" mode.
● The visual effects of Awakener "Clementine"'s "Mindstrangulation" and other abilities that force the Rival to discard Hand cards are now clearer and more intuitive.
● The Effect descriptions of the Wheels of Destiny "Gift of Decay" and "School Day" have been clarified to specify that the DMG provided by the Wheel of Destiny is dealt by the wielder.

6. Problem Fix
[A Story...]
● Fixed the issue where story playback would get stuck and could only be skipped in certain stages, including Investigation 1-13, 7-15, and Special Ops: Happy Hunting! Section 7.
● Fixed the issue where the wrong Jenkin illustration was used in the final stage "Origin" of the Special Ops "Serene Fission." After the fix, the Awakener "Jenkin" illustration is now used.
● Fixed an issue in the "Prologue" Story where the "Skip" button might flicker abnormally when tapped rapidly.

[Battle]
● Fixed an issue where clicking the Realm gauge area to view the Realm State while an Awakener's Exalt was available could incorrectly trigger the Exalt release confirmation window.
● Fixed the issue where the number would incorrectly wrap to a new line when the "Crimson Furnace" healing value exceeded 3 digits in the Caro Realm.
● Fixed an issue in the Ultra Realm where, upon entering an Ultra Round, the enemy's "Dimensional Rift" would incorrectly display a locked effect.
● Fixed the issue where the threat Hint value displayed incorrectly after the Poison Effect triggered at turn end was resolved.
● Fixed an issue where the "Total Damage" value on the right side could incorrectly display as a negative number in certain situations.
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Castor"'s skill "Umbral Flight" had desynchronized sound effects and visual effects.
● Fixed an issue where the battle would not end immediately upon killing the Boss "Puppet of Putrescence" if other enemies were still alive.

[Stage]
● Fixed an issue where the effect descriptions for the Resonance nodes "Convocation" in Chapter 8 and "Heart of Silver" in Chapter 9 of the Investigation Faded Legacy were incorrect, and updated "Mythag Student ID" to "Entrance Ceremony."
● Fixed an issue where the Faded Legacy Relics "Modern Axle," "Silent Prelude," "Serpent's Husk," "Mother Effigy," and "Devoted Heart," as well as the Astral Reign Relics "Veil of the Nameless Deity" and "Dimension Image: Ramona," could trigger their effects when playing "Rouse." After the fix, the related effects can only be triggered when playing a "Command Card."
● Fixed the issue where the Bleed Effect applied by the Astral Reign Relic "Salvific Limb" would incorrectly affect all enemies.
● Fixed an issue where cards transformed by the Symptom Card "Delirium" were incorrectly affected by various Arithmetica Cost increase or decrease effects; after the fix, the cost is permanently fixed at 3.
● Fixed an issue where the "Utopian Veil" generated by the "Lex Volis" Orison would skip the initially equipped Posse after being played, and after selecting and unleashing a Posse, it would consume one Posse unleash count, causing the next Posse unleash to become "Sealed Old Memories" or "Unforgotten Twilight".
● Fixed the issue where the enemy "Puppet of Putrescence" did not correctly clear other summoned enemies after death.
● Fixed an issue where the enemy "Twin Contradiction," after being affected by Fainted or Petrify, could be Killed before unleashing "Dawn of Rebirth," "Giant's Collapse," or "Forced Fusion" in the following turn, incorrectly skipping subsequent phases.
● Adjusted the name of the "Fervor" State for the enemy Sealed "Dawn", renaming it to the more accurate "Temporary Fervor". The actual Effect remains unchanged.
● Fixed an issue where the State "Gradually Breaking Link" of the enemy "Sage" failed to permanently increase the Posse cost after the first Posse was released each turn.
● Fixed the issue where blank buttons were incorrectly displayed at the bottom of the interface when previewing multiple Relics in the event options of "Exploration".

[Features]
● Fixed an issue in the Return event "Back-to-School Day" where, after completing the "Astral Reign: Limited" Awakener trial, the Day 1 mission "Complete 1 Awakener Trial Stage" could not be completed.
● Fixed an issue in the "Manifold Healing: Rerun" event where the "New" indicator on the left tab could not be removed.
● Fixed an issue in Awakening Events such as "One in a Million" where, after obtaining an Awakener and an SSR Wheel of Destiny in 5 Awakens, sharing the Awakening results would cause the game to become unresponsive.
● Fixed an issue in the "Awakener-Talent" interface where "Insufficient resources" might be incorrectly displayed even when the required materials and Rose Scrip were sufficient.
● Fixed the issue where sorting by "Clear Date" in ascending order within the Stage "Clear Record" displayed as empty.
● Fixed the issue where selecting "Mute" for background playback in "Settings - Sound" did not take effect when playing on PC.
● Fixed an issue where, in rare cases of poor network conditions, repeatedly clicking to purchase "Investigation Supply Box" and other bundle deals could result in duplicate Silver Prime deductions. We are actively investigating related historical issues, and if any are discovered, they will be refunded directly to Keepers via mail.
● Fixed an issue where, in rare cases of poor network conditions, duplicate payments could occur when purchasing one-time-only items such as "Beginner's Special Offer", "Recursive Archives", and "Ouroboros Codex". We are actively investigating related historical issues, and if any are found, we will contact Keepers via in-game mail or customer service to resolve them.

[Show]
● Fixed an issue in the "Communicator" where Juliette's avatar displayed as a black avatar after completing her dialogue. Her avatar will now display correctly.
● Fixed the issue where the font for the "New" hint on the "Details" button in "Awaken" was incorrect.
● Fixed an issue where the font and color of the "Not Achieved" text in the "Premium Gallery" collection rewards were incorrect.
● Fixed the issue in the "Tasks" interface of the "Curriculum" where "Topic EXP" was incorrectly written as "Topic EXP"; it has been unified as "Topic EXP".
● Fixed the issue where the red dot position on the category tab in "Manual: Career Achievements" was incorrect.
● Fixed an issue where "Reality Verge" in the top-right corner might not display when switching pages in the "Dreamscape" and "Multidimensional Link" interfaces.
● Fixed the issue where the scrollbar on the right side of the pop-up window was displayed in an incorrect position when embedding Orisons in "Investigation" and when selecting a Wheel of Destiny in the trial mode of "Traphase".
● Fixed the issue where, after viewing the tag information of non-"Chaos" Realm Awakener enemies in the Stage's "Boss Preview," the "Chaos" Realm Awakener enemies would display incorrect Realm tags.
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener Skin "Agrippa: Pallid Covenant" displayed incorrect character art during Emote switching.
● Fixed the issue where the text size of blue buttons was inconsistent across most game interfaces.
● Fixed the issue in the Awakener Murphy: Fauxborn's profile where the suffix for the battle voice line "Skill: I" was missing, and "Skill: II" was incorrectly displayed as "Skill: IV".
● Fixed the issue where the battle voice lines "Strike: I," "Strike: II," "Hit: I," and "Hit: II" were missing from the Awakener Murphy: Fauxborn's profile.

[Traphase]
● Fixed an issue where the special effect on the "End Turn" button hint was missing.
● Fixed an issue where the Wheel of Destiny "Hour of Fortune" Draw did not properly reset the deck when the Draw Pile was empty.
● Fixed an issue where Relics "Joyous Record" and "Mythag Insignia", as well as Posses "Cruel Homage" and "Sacred Mending" were missing text Hints when drawing cards.
● Fixed the issue where the Relic details would abnormally flash when viewing Relics in Draft Pick mode.
● Fixed an issue where, after clicking the "My Comments" button, the comment details screen would display incorrect information such as blank avatars in certain situations.
● A total of 10 data statistics error issues have been fixed, as follows:
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Ogier"'s "Seven Arts and Virtues" was unable to properly track the Shield dealt.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Sanga"'s "Coral Spiral" was unable to properly track the Shield it generated.
    ○ Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Alva"'s "Judgment of Justice" could not properly track the Shield generated.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the "Defensive Beam" of the Awakener "Winkle" could not properly track the Shield generated.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Wheel of Destiny "Vitality" could not properly track Shield.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Posse "Obsession Eternal" could not properly track Shield.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Posse "Feast of Decay" incorrectly tracked split HP and Shield values.
    ○ Fixed an issue where overflow healing from healing effects could not be properly counted in statistics.
    ○ Fixed the issue where the "Sacrifice" effect could not be properly attributed to the source of application, and was not tracked separately by different Awakener sources.
    ○ Fixed the issue where "Bleeding" and "Poison" effects were not being tracked separately by each Awakener's source.

[Rapture Express!]
● Fixed an issue where severe lag could occur during consecutive battles in "Rapture Express!".
● Fixed an issue in "Rapture Express!" where the "Save and Exit" option would incorrectly appear in battle replay after selecting "Save and Exit."
● Fixed an issue where Relics with HP recovery effects such as "Blessed Blood" in "Rapture Express!" had incorrect HP recovery values in their out-of-combat descriptions; after the fix, they now match the in-combat descriptions and actual effects.
● Fixed an issue in "Rapture Express!" where the HP Healing values in the out-of-combat descriptions for Exalt and Command Cards were incorrect; after the fix, they now match the in-combat descriptions and actual effects.
● Fixed a description error in the "Rapture Express!" event "Unbidden Warning", correcting "involve a Command Card" to "involve a Card". The actual effect remains unchanged.

7. Localization
[Simplified Chinese]
● Fixed multiple typo issues in Chapters 5 through 8 of the Faded Legacy arc in "Investigation."
● Fixed a typo in the "Thais" message in the "Communicator."

[English]
● "Investigation" Astral Reign Chapter 2 has now been translated by human translators. All currently available "Investigation" story content has been completed with human English translation.
● Some wording in the English translations of "Investigation" Faded Legacy Chapter 6 and "Dreamscape: Desecrate" has been made more fluent.
● The description of Awakener "Horla"'s "Writing with Feeling" Talent has been adjusted for greater accuracy.
● Fixed the issue with incorrect in-battle effect description of the Wheel of Destiny "Delirium" in "Traphase".
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener enemy "Primordial Devoutee" intention "Lost City of Lemuria" had ambiguous translation wording.

[Other]
● Keepers can now input their names on tombstones in more languages.
● Fixed an issue where the "Awaken" interface and description text were not correctly translated under certain language settings.
● Fixed the issue where the task description text in "Events" was not fully displayed under certain language settings.
● Fixed the issue where the title text of the Event Summary screen exceeded the screen boundaries upon the first daily login under certain language settings.
● Fixed an issue where, when the device language was set to Turkish, game text might incorrectly display in Simplified Chinese under the English language setting.
